source_description: Sanitized static HTML page migrated from legacy Reader-Core samples/fixtures/html/sample_js_runtime_001_input.html. Captures the JS-runtime timeout fallback contract: a minimal <article> element with a data-sample attribute, intended for testing the rule engine's behavior when a JS-dependent rule times out and must fall back to static HTML extraction.
sanitization: Pure synthetic placeholder content ('timeout fallback contract'). No real domain, no scripts, no external resources, no credentials.

privacy_check.notes: Minimal synthetic HTML; no real data or external resources.
